name: justeat-es
description: Find, compare, prepare, and explicitly confirm Just Eat Spain orders from ChatGPT Work or Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Ask for food, water, or groceries
interface.longDescription: Tell ChatGPT what you want from Just Eat Spain. It compares real delivered totals, prepares a basket, and never places an order without your exact confirmation.
defaultPrompt: Find the cheapest way to get at least 20 litres of still water delivered. Compare the full price including fees, but do not order.
Find me a healthy, tasty dinner under €20. Show me the best three choices, but do not order.
Add option 1 to my basket, but do not place the order.
Open my Just Eat basket so I can check out myself.
